CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE source_table (id INT, value INT);
WITH cte AS (SELECT value FROM source_table WHERE id > 1) INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) SELECT id, 'Value:' || value FROM cte;
WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT num + 1 FROM cte WHERE num < 5) INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) SELECT num, 'Generated:' || num FROM cte;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) SELECT t1.id, 'Combined:' || t2.value FROM source_table t1 JOIN source_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value > 100;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, description VARCHAR(200));
INSERT INTO another_table (id, description) SELECT id, CONCAT('Record ', id) FROM source_table WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM source_table WHERE value > 150);
WITH cte1 AS (SELECT id, value FROM source_table WHERE value < 250), cte2 AS (SELECT id FROM cte1 WHERE id % 2 = 0) INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) SELECT cte2.id, 'Even ID: ' || cte2.id FROM cte2;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) SELECT id, 'Total: ' || SUM(value) FROM source_table GROUP BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) SELECT DISTINCT id, 'Unique Value: ' || value FROM source_table WHERE value BETWEEN 100 AND 300;
